description:
Returns a list of active users associated with a project.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view of the resource to return (which attributes should be present in the response). Users without read permissions to Directory are limited to the compact view. Otherwise, the defa...

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[permission_template]
parameters.description: Permission Template ID. Returns item(s) assiociated with the specified Permission Template ID.

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor IDs.

parameters.name: filters[origin_id]
parameters.description: Origin ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Origin ID.

parameters.name: filters[trade_id][]
parameters.description: Returns users whose vendor record is associated with the specified trade id(s).

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns users where the search string matches the user's first name, last name, email address, keywords, job title, or company name

parameters.name: filters[employee]
parameters.description: Returns users whose is_employee attribute matches the parameter.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Returns users whose id attribute matches the parameter.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Returns items with the specified sort.
